channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: As oil soars, experts watch Red Sea tankers for clarity on Houthi blockade
item.description: Houthi attacks for now are shaping who moves Saudi crude, not whether it moves, analysts say, even as oil prices soar.

item.title: What are the Abraham Accords?
item.description: US President Donald Trump has seemingly backpedalled on a nuclear deal with Saudi Arabia.

item.title: US launches 13th night of strikes as Iran warns of escalation in the Gulf
item.description: Al Jazeera’s Tohid Asadi reports from Tehran as the US launches strikes for the 13th consecutive night.

item.title: ‘There’s no salary’: DRC health workers tell of hardship as Ebola spreads
item.description: Health workers in the DRC battle a range of obstacles, from infection risk to angry mob attacks.

item.title: US court affirms release of pro-Palestine scholar as legal battle continues
item.description: Appeal judges' decision to side with Georgetown's Badar Khan Suri against Trump sets up Supreme Court intervention.

item.title: Ukraine’s Zelenskyy meets with far-right US activist Laura Loomer
item.description: Pro-Israel Trump ally sits down with Ukrainian president as she says Russia is helping Iran kill US soldiers.

item.title: Mike Waltz pressed over Al Jazeera video during congressional hearing
item.description: Ted Lieu challenges UN Ambassador Mike Waltz after playing Al Jazeera footage of Iranian strikes in Jordan.

item.title: Trump imposes new double-digit tariffs on dozens of countries
item.description: With existing 10 percent levies set to expire, Trump issues new tariffs on 60 countries under forced labour provision.

item.title: Analyst: voting against Iran war funding a tough sell for Congress
item.description: The US says it has spent more than $37.5 billion on the Iran war so far.

item.title: Israel bombs Gaza after displacement orders, kills two Palestinians
item.description: Humanitarian situation in Gaza is 'desperate', UN official says, as Israeli violations of 'ceasefire' intensify.

item.title: UN envoy for Yemen ‘alarmed’ by Houthis’ Red Sea attacks, calls for talks
item.description: Hans Grundberg warns that further confrontation risks 'deepening the suffering of the Yemeni people'.

item.title: Iran war live: US completes 13th night of strikes on Iran
item.description: Trump says he is considering a ‘massive attack’, as Iran's Araghchi says 'mindless aggression' won't help a deal.

item.title: Trump expands voluntary pledge to blunt AI-driven utility bill surges
item.description: White House hails pledge that seeks to shield consumers from the cost of energy for data centres as 'historic'.

item.title: Two Palestinians killed as Israel intensifies strikes on Gaza City
item.description: Two Palestinians were killed and several others injured in a new wave of Israeli airstrikes on Gaza City.

item.title: How the Houthi Red Sea blockade will impact the world
item.description: The Houthis' blockade of Bab al-Mandeb threatens a vital global trade route.

item.title: Arab and Muslim countries condemn Israeli storming of Al-Aqsa Mosque
item.description: Israeli settlers' storming of Islam's holy site fuels 'hatred' and obstructs lasting peace, joint statement says.

item.title: Is this Italy’s ‘George Floyd moment’?
item.description: The death of Moroccan-born Abderrahim Fakir after he was restrained by police in Bologna has sparked protests.

item.title: US war on Iran: The $110 billion price tag
item.description: America's war on Iran has cost the US nearly $110 billion. Now, the Trump administration wants another $67 billion.

item.title: US attacks Iran for 13th night as Trump threatens ‘bigger’ strikes
item.description: The US president's threat comes after another day of Iranian attacks on Bahrain, Kuwait and Jordan.

item.title: US-Saudi nuclear deal hinges on normalisation with Israel
item.description: President Trump said a proposed US-Saudi civilian nuclear deal is subject to Saudi Arabia joining the Abraham Accords

item.title: Rally attendee steals the show by mimicking Trump’s gestures
item.description: A rally attendee seated directly behind Trump drew attention by mimicking the president.

item.title: France wildfires force evacuation of over 20,000 people from tourist town
item.description: About 800 firefighters and hundreds of gendarmes and soldiers deployed to battle the flames west of Bordeaux.

item.title: Videos show the moment police officer shoots man on street in Wisconsin
item.description: Outrage is growing after videos show a police officer fatally shooting a man in the US state of Wisconsin.

item.title: White House says will not block Tate brothers’ extradition to UK
item.description: Social media influencers to be extradited after UK authorities file dozens of new sex crime charges against them.

item.title: Deadly monsoon floods kill at least 40 in India
item.description: At least 40 people have died and up to 80 remain missing after heavy monsoon rains triggered severe flooding.
